sections.heading: New API for Independent Shard Scaling (v20240805)
sections.body:
Starting with API resource version 20240805 of the [versioning](api-versioning-overview),
you can now independently scale the cluster tier for each shard of a [sharded cluster](manual/reference/glossary).

> **Warning:** The new API version is a breaking change that irreversibily changes the state of your cluster.
> If you use the new API to independently scale the cluster tier of the shards in your sharded cluster,
> you won't be able to use previous symmetrical-only API (Application Programming Interface) versions to manage that cluster.

This new API version is a significant change to the underlying scaling model of Atlas Clusters.
The new API is capable of describing asymmetric clusters, where each shard has different configurations.
The `replicationSpec.numShards` field is not present in the new API schema.
Each shard *must* be specified as a separate element of the `replicationSpecs`,
even for symmetric clusters in which all shards are configured the same.
